name: Eleanor Baratheon
description:
Small note: Eleanor Baratheon is an Oc so my character does not exist in the Game of Thrones universe.

First name: Eleanor

Last name: Denormandie born then Baratheon

Age 20 years

Allegiance: House Baratheon House Denormandie

Birth: Year 282

Allie: Ellie the courageous queen by the population, ellie by her brother Richard Lady or my queen by Joffrey

Character: Eleanor is sweet, kind but when she is in a bad mood she is very arrogant

Tire: Queen consort

Parents William I Denormandie (father) Mathilde Denormandie (mother)

Origin: France (Normandy) then King's Landing

Siblings: Richard Denormandie (older brother)

Physique: Eleanor has long brown hair, her eyes are blue

Relationship: Joffrey Baratheon (husband)

Religion: Catholic then liver of the seven

Statue: Alive

Family: Cersie Lannister (mother-in-law) Jamie Lannister ("father-in-law") Robert Baratheon † (father-in-law")

Tommen Baratheon (brother-in-law) Myrcella Baratheon (sister-in-law)

Children: Louis (eldest son) Elizabeth (youngest daughter) Henry (youngest son) Gabriella (youngest)

Eleanor was born in France in Normandy,

Her childhood was broken when she was 10 years old her father William received a marriage proposal from Robert Baratheon to marry her to Joffrey but her mother Matilda refused that her daughter marry so young, William wrote to Robert Baratheon to avoid a war he proposed to marry Eleanor on her 16th birthday which Robert Baratheon accepted against all expectations.

Eleanor quickly gained the favor of the population thanks
creator: Eleanor Denormandie
